2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

COPYRIGHT (c) KANKOJEEPHOTOGRAPHY
Caldwell Athletics

34 Austin Amponsah

  • Position Forward
  • Height 6-6
  • Weight 215
  • Class Sophomore
  • Hometown Grand Rapids, Mich.
  • Highschool Grand Rapids Christian
  • Major Exercise Science
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography



2025-26: Played in 11 games, with a season-high four minutes at STAC 11/22... grabbed a rebound and had an assist vs. Bentley 11/15... 

2024-25: Played in 5 games... played a total of 9 minutes...

Before Caldwell: 23-24 OK White 3rd team

About Austin: Parents Ben and Keli...Sister Avery... Tore ACL Junior year and came back senior year averaging 8.4 points 5.2 rebounds... Career goal is to become a physical therapist...
